text:
The [marriage] / [civil partnership] subsisted on [date].

The [marriage] / [civil partnership] did not subsist on [date].

The validity of the [divorce] / [annulment] / [legal separation] obtained in [insert country outside England and Wales] in respect of the [marriage] / [civil partnership] [is] [is not] entitled to recognition in England and Wales.

Costs

The costs of this application are [specify].

Dated [date]

Order
[Family Law Act 1986, section 55] /
[Civil Partnership Act 2004, section 181]
